body_txt: A Subverted Trope happens, or seems to happen... and then that subversion is subverted within itself. These let a writer eat their cake and have it too: get the trick of a Subverted Trope , without abandoning the plot-furthering nature of that trope . It is more frequent when the subverted form of the trope is very common, almost a trope in itself, so the second subversion really does subvert an existing trope. It is possible to triple subvert a trope (and so on); see Zig-Zagging Trope . See Playing with a Trope for a comparison with many other ways that a trope can be used. This page may contain unhidden spoilers. Caution advised.
